title: VESILUTE
description: Vesilute is a commercial formulation containing vinpocetine, a semi-synthetic derivative of the vinca alkaloid vincamine, which is used to enhance cerebral blood flow and glucose utilization. It acts as a phosphodiesterase type-1 (PDE1) inhibitor and a voltage-gated sodium channel blocker, primarily utilized for cognitive enhancement and the management of cerebrovascular disorders.

research.title: Vinpocetine (A comprehensive profile)
research.summary: Explores vinpocetine's role as a nootropic that improves brain metabolism and blood flow while acting as a neuroprotective agent.

research.title: Efficacy and tolerability of pharmacological treatments for insomnia in adults: A systematic review and network meta-analysis
research.summary: A comprehensive review of pharmacological interventions for sleep disorders, relevant to assessing the broader context of sleep-related supplements.

research.title: Clinical Practice Guideline for the Pharmacologic Treatment of Chronic Insomnia in Adults
research.summary: Establishes clinical standards for addressing sleep maintenance and latency, providing a benchmark for evaluating supplement efficacy.

research.title: Melatonin and health: an umbrella review of health outcomes and biological mechanisms of action
research.summary: Analyzes the impact of sleep-regulating compounds on health outcomes, including sleep latency and anxiety reduction.

sentiment.summary: Users generally report high satisfaction with the cognitive clarity and concentration benefits, though some note it requires consistent cycling to maintain effectiveness.

effects.label: Acute Cognitive Boost:
effects.description: Most effective when taken 30-60 minutes before tasks requiring high mental output

effects.label: Memory Retention:
effects.description: Users report better recall of technical information when used daily

effects.label: Consistent Results:
effects.description: Shows higher efficacy in users with age-related cognitive decline or fatigue-based brain fog

effects.label: Synergy with Caffeine:
effects.description: Frequently reported to 'smooth out' the jitters of stimulants while enhancing focus

dosage.label: Standard Dose:
dosage.description: 5-10 mg taken three times daily is the most common regimen in clinical literature

dosage.label: Introductory Dose:
dosage.description: New users often start with a single 5 mg dose to assess tolerance

dosage.label: Daily Maximum:
dosage.description: Most sources suggest not exceeding 30 mg per day to avoid side effects

dosage.label: Cycle Timing:
dosage.description: Many users suggest 5 days on and 2 days off to prevent receptor downregulation

sideEffects.label: Headaches:
sideEffects.description: Occasional reports of pressure headaches likely due to increased cerebral blood flow

sideEffects.label: Digestive Discomfort:
sideEffects.description: Mild nausea or stomach upset if taken on an empty stomach

sideEffects.label: Flushing:
sideEffects.description: Temporary redness or warmth in the face post-ingestion

sideEffects.label: Sleep Disturbance:
sideEffects.description: May cause vivid dreams or difficulty falling asleep if taken too late in the evening

availability.label: Regulatory Status:
availability.description: Sold as a dietary supplement in the US but regulated as a prescription drug in several European countries

availability.label: Sourcing:
availability.description: Widely available through major nootropic retailers and specialized supplement sources
